results.name: wave-151-crew-self.test.js
results.output:
Wave 151 — Crew Self-Clock-In Tests

API Controller:
  ✅ controller exports selfClockIn
  ✅ controller exports selfClockOut
  ✅ selfClockIn validates crew membership
  ✅ selfClockIn uses userId (not technicianId from body)
  ✅ selfClockIn sets clock_in_method to self
  ✅ selfClockIn checks no open time entry

Routes:
  ✅ route registered for self-clock-in
  ✅ route registered for self-clock-out
  ✅ routes use POST method

Mobile API Service:
  ✅ api.service exports selfClockIn function
  ✅ api.service exports selfClockOut function
  ✅ selfClockIn calls /self-clock-in endpoint

WO Detail Screen:
  ✅ WO detail imports useAuth
  ✅ WO detail imports selfClockIn
  ✅ WO detail has clock in/out handler

Regression:
  ✅ existing crewClockIn export still present
  ✅ existing crewClockOut export still present

17/17 tests passed
